steps.title: Apply the margin of error
steps.content: The margin of error gives a symmetric interval around the estimate of $64\%$. Subtract and add $2.76\%$ to find the endpoints: $$64\%-2.76\%=61.24\%$$ $$64\%+2.76\%=66.76\%$$

steps.title: Select the interval
steps.content: The plausible values are greater than $61.24\%$ and less than $66.76\%$, because the interval extends that far below and above the estimate. The answer is A.
